# Skóreová

> Independent media covering Czech women's football: the first league, the
> second league, the domestic cup, Czech clubs in European competitions
> (UWCL, UWEC), and the national team. Made in Czechia, written in English.

Skóreová is a media brand, not a governing body. The landing site tells the
story of the sport; the platform carries the data (fixtures, results,
standings, top scorers, club and player profiles).

## Site structure

- [Landing page](https://beta.skoreova.com/): why the sport matters,
  what we cover, the map of clubs, the reigning champion (Sparta Praha),
  the player spotlight, and the national team.
- [Platform](https://beta.platform.skoreova.com/): the data product —
  results, standings, charts, and profiles. Club profiles live at
  `/clubs/<slug>` (19 clubs across two leagues) and competition profiles
  at `/competitions/<slug>` (first-league, second-league, domestic-cup,
  uwcl, uwec, national-team), free and open — no account needed.

## Key facts

- Czechia's three biggest cities all have top-flight women's football.
- Sparta Praha are the reigning champions: the 2025/2026 domestic double and
  a semifinal run in the UEFA Women's Europa Cup.
- The national team plays the 2027 World Cup qualifying play-offs
  (Round 1: Czechia — Scotland, October 2026).

## Social

@skoreova on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Threads, Facebook, and X.
